name: Anadolu Anonim Turk Sigorta Sirketi
summary: Anadolu Anonim T√É¬ºrk Sigorta Sirketi offers non-life insurance products in Turkey. It primarily offers accident, health, motor vehicles, air vehicles, watercraft, marine, fire and natural disasters, general losses, credit, financial losses, legal protection, bond, motor vehicle liability, aircraft liability, general liability, theft, engineering, travel, agriculture, and personal accident insurance products. The company also provides insurance research, life insurance statistical, reinsurance, and fronting services, as well as disseminating information about insurance services. It serves through authorized and unauthorized agencies. The company was founded in 1925 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
